title: T9 Other non-refundable tax offset 2020
description: Complete question T9 to claim other non-refundable tax offsets.
keywords: other non-refundable tax offsets, non-refundable tax offset, tax offset, 2020, paper tax return, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement, T9

content_blocks.text: Did you perform work or services in the Joint Petroleum Development Area (JPDA) of the Timor Sea during the period 1 July 2019 to 29 August 2019?

rows: Go to T10 Other refundable tax offsets 2020 , or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2020 .

content_blocks.text: To work out how to deal with your JPDA income, you will need a copy of the Timor Sea Treaty – Joint Petroleum Development Area instructions 2020 . The instruction sheet will tell you how to complete your tax return so that you receive the correct assessment.
Add up all your tax offset amounts at this item. Write the total at C item T9 . Do not show cents.
Print H in the Claim Type box at the right of C item T9 .

items: Go to question T10 Other refundable tax offsets 2020 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2020 .
Go back to question T8 Early stage investor 2020 .

content_text:
Did you perform work or services in the Joint Petroleum Development Area (JPDA) of the Timor Sea during the period 1 July 2019 to 29 August 2019?
No | Go to T10 Other refundable tax offsets 2020 , or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2020 .
Yes | Read below.
To work out how to deal with your JPDA income, you will need a copy of the Timor Sea Treaty – Joint Petroleum Development Area instructions 2020 . The instruction sheet will tell you how to complete your tax return so that you receive the correct assessment.
## Completing this item
### Step 1
Add up all your tax offset amounts at this item. Write the total at C item T9 . Do not show cents.
### Step 2
Print H in the Claim Type box at the right of C item T9 .
## Where to go next
- Go to question T10 Other refundable tax offsets 2020 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2020 .
- Go back to question T8 Early stage investor 2020 .
